headlines.headline: Volval Devices to host investor day focused on cloud infrastructure strategy

sentiment.reasoning: Investor days are strategic events that typically provide clarity on long-term goals but rarely trigger immediate material financial shifts.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
